name: JetPar7ZIP
comment:
Jet Par7ZIP is a flexible IP65 rated LED zoom PAR featuring a 7x20W RGB + WarmWhite LED source delivering phenomenal output and great flexibility for both indoor and outdoor application.
Its Spektra calibrated LED source delivers a high-quality white reproduction with high CRI and TLCI scores as well an extremely precise colour tuning.
Jet Par7ZIP is truly focusable through the motorized zoom system ranging from 4.5° to 53°, being a truly versatile workhorse for any application requiring an advanced control of the light and weatherproof.
